an7.77:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, possessing seven qualities, a bhikkhu is an expert in the discipline. What seven?
an7.77:1.2: "(1) He knows what is an offense. (2) He knows what is not an offense. (3) He knows what is a light offense. (4) He knows what is a grave offense. (5) He is one who is firm in the discipline, immovable. (6) He is one who gains at will … the four jhānas …. (7) With the destruction of the taints, he has realized for himself with direct knowledge … the taintless liberation of mind, liberation by wisdom … he dwells in it.
an7.77:1.3: "Possessing these seven qualities, a bhikkhu is an expert in the discipline."
